info.title: Hair Loss Diagnosis & Treatment Platform API
info.description: Complete API documentation for the Hair Loss Diagnosis & Treatment Platform

get.description: Retrieve comprehensive dashboard statistics including patient counts, revenue, appointments, and monthly trends for the last 12 months
Get all appointments for the authenticated patient with filtering and export options

post.description: Create a new appointment for the authenticated patient

get.description: Get a specific appointment for the authenticated patient

post.description: Create Razorpay order for appointment payment
Authenticate user and return JWT token
Register a new user and return JWT token
Logout user and revoke JWT token

get.description: Get current authenticated dermatologist's profile information

bio.example: Experienced dermatologist specializing in hair loss treatment

put.description: Update current authenticated dermatologist's profile information

bio.example: Experienced dermatologist specializing in hair loss treatment
Experienced dermatologist specializing in hair loss treatment

get.description: Returns a paginated list of employees (10 per page).

post.description: Create a new employee. Validates: first_name/last_name (required, min 2), email (required, unique), phone (optional), department_id (optional, must exist in departments), status (optional boolean).

put.description: Update an existing employee. All fields are optional (partial update). Same validation rules as create for provided fields; email must be unique excluding current record.

get.description: Get list of available dermatologists for appointment booking
Get current authenticated patient's profile information

put.description: Update current authenticated patient's profile information

get.description: Get all hair loss quiz questions

post.description: Submit hair loss quiz responses for analysis

get.description: Get all quiz responses for the authenticated user

post.description: Create a Razorpay plan and subscription

get.description: Get current user's latest subscription status

post.description: Cancel current user's subscription (both local and Razorpay)
Verifies X-Razorpay-Signature and processes events like subscription.charged, payment.failed, subscription.cancelled

count.description: Number of appointments for the month

monthly_appointments.description: Monthly appointment trends for the last 12 months

monthly_revenue.description: Monthly revenue trends for the last 12 months

bio.example: Experienced dermatologist specializing in hair loss treatments
Experienced dermatologist specializing in hair loss treatments
